/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/AlgorithmPlayground.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/coordinator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/server_main.cpp.o -o crypto_demo   -L/home/fefan/Desktop/SecurityTechnologies/Project/PV204project/lib/frostdemo/target/release  -Wl,-rpath,/home/fefan/Desktop/SecurityTechnologies/Project/PV204project/lib/frostdemo/target/release -lfrostdemo /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so -ldl -lpthread
